name: llm-guard-kit
summary: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.12.0: DeepLocalVerifier bootstrap MLP (AUROC 0.855 + ptrue), LSTMRiskAccumulator step-level LSTM (AUROC 0.828 standalone, $0 inference, exp138). v0.11.0: calibrate_isotonic, conformal_alert_threshold, kalman_smooth_risks (exp134-137).
author: Avighan Majumder
